title: cyperus seemannianus
intro: Cyperus seemannianus, also known as Seemann's sedge or Seemann's papyrus, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus seemannianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Cyperus seemannianus is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or salve.
